nodes.label: Opening / Intro
nodes.content:
**Intro:**
> "Hey [Name], this is Dylan with The Free Website Wizards..."

**Purpose statement:**
> "The reason I'm reaching out is..."

nodes.label: Rapport / Pattern Interrupt
nodes.content:
**Pattern interrupt:**
> "I'm not trying to sell you anything today..."

**Rapport builder:**
> "How's business been going for you?"

nodes.label: Qualification Questions
nodes.content:
**Question 1 — Current situation:**
> "How are you currently getting new customers/leads?"

**Question 2 — Pain points:**
> "What's been your biggest challenge with marketing/lead gen?"

**Question 3 — Goals:**
> "If we could solve that, what would that mean for your business?"

**Question 4 — Budget/Authority:**
> "Are you the decision-maker when it comes to marketing?"

**Disqualification criteria:**
> Not the decision-maker AND can't get them on a call

nodes.label: Qualified?
nodes.content: Evaluate whether the prospect meets qualification criteria based on their answers.

nodes.label: Disqualify & End Call
nodes.content: Politely end the call. Thank them for their time and leave the door open for the future.

nodes.label: Pitch / Presentation
nodes.content:
**Transition to pitch:**
> "Based on what you've told me, here's what I think would work best..."

**The offer:**
> "We build you a free website, set up an AI chatbot, and create an automated follow-up system..."

**Social proof:**
> "We just did this for a [trade] in [city] and they booked [X] appointments in the first month..."

**Value framing:**
> "The total investment to get access to the full system is..."

nodes.label: Interested?
nodes.content: Gauge the prospect's interest level after the pitch.

nodes.label: Which Objection?
nodes.content: Identify the specific objection the prospect has raised.

nodes.label: Price Objection
nodes.content:
**When they say "It's too expensive" or "I can't afford that":**
> "I totally understand. Let me ask you this — how much is it costing you right now to NOT have a steady flow of leads?"

**Follow-up if they push back again:**
> "What if we could break this into a payment plan?"

nodes.label: Timing Objection
nodes.content:
**When they say "Now's not a good time" or "Call me in a few months":**
> "I hear you. Quick question though — when IS a good time to start getting more customers?"

**Follow-up:**
> "The businesses that start during slow seasons are the ones crushing it when things pick up..."

nodes.label: Need to Think About It
nodes.content:
**When they say "Let me think about it" or "I need to sleep on it":**
> "Absolutely, I want you to feel confident. What specifically do you want to think about?"

**Isolate the real objection:**
> "Is it the price, the timing, or something about how the service works?"

nodes.label: Spouse / Partner Objection
nodes.content:
**When they say "I need to talk to my wife/husband/partner":**
> "That makes total sense. Would it help if we got them on a quick call so they can hear it firsthand?"

**Alternative:**
> "What questions do you think they'll have? Let me give you the answers now so you can share..."

nodes.label: Closing
nodes.content:
**Trial close:**
> "Based on everything we talked about, does this sound like something that could work for your business?"

**Direct close:**
> "Awesome — let's get you started. I just need [info] to set everything up..."

**Urgency/scarcity (if applicable):**
> "We only take on [X] new clients per month in each market to avoid competition..."

**Booking the next step:**
> "Let's lock in your onboarding call — does [day] at [time] work?"

nodes.label: Closed?
nodes.content: Did the prospect agree to move forward?

nodes.label: Book Onboarding
nodes.content: Confirm the onboarding call date/time. Send calendar invite and welcome materials.

nodes.label: Follow-Up Sequence
nodes.content:
**If they don't close on the call:**
> "I'll send you a quick recap text with the details we discussed..."

**Follow-up cadence:**
> Day 1: Recap text with details
> Day 3: Check-in call/text
> Day 7: Value-add content
> Day 14: Re-engagement

**Re-engagement script:**
> "Hey [Name], just checking in — still interested in getting that website set up?"
